title: adelocaryum flexuosum
intro: Adelocaryum flexuosum, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Adelocaryum flexuosum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, and can also be used as a topical application to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
